completed_tasks.name: Patch 03-01: Schema validation + lazy config loader
completed_tasks.progress: loadConnectorsConfig patched for full schema validation, getConnectorsConfig memoized wrapper added. Behavior specs updated. Not yet committed.

Patch all plans: Defensive input validation specs (mcpClient guards)
Commit all patches, update REVIEWS.md gate to PASS, squash-merge to master

human_actions_pending.action: Create gmail-mcp-pete repo skeleton on GitHub (UsernameTron/gmail-mcp-pete)
human_actions_pending.context: 03-03 integration tests need this repo to exist. Not blocking plan patches but needed before execute-phase.

decisions.decision: GitHub connector uses list_commits + list_issues + list_pull_requests per repo (not list_user_events)
decisions.rationale: MCP_DOCKER does not expose list_user_events tool. Verified via ToolSearch.
Activity types are implicit in tool selection. eventTypes was for a fictional unified events API.

decisions.decision: Gmail connector passes allowedSenders to server-side MCP call
decisions.rationale: D-09 specifies server-side VIP filtering. Plan omitted wiring the parameter.

decisions.decision: All connectors use memoized lazy config loader
decisions.rationale: Module-level config load is brittle for Phase 4 graceful degradation.

decisions.decision: loadConnectorsConfig validates full JSON schema (not just top-level keys)
decisions.rationale: D-23 specifies schema validation. Top-level-only check misses type errors.

next_action: Finish remaining patches (03-02 calendar edge cases, defensive input validation), commit all, update REVIEWS.md gate to PASS, squash-merge branch to master, then /gsd:execute-phase 3
context_notes: Cross-AI review returned PATCH-THEN-PROCEED from both Gemini and Codex. 2 HIGH (GitHub tool surface, Gmail VIP wiring) and several MEDIUM. 3 of 5 patches applied on branch docs/phase3-cross-ai-review (5 commits). Remaining patches are smaller. After patches, update REVIEWS.md gate to PASS, merge, execute.
